ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the passenger (male/female) */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sib_sp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents or children aboard */,
  "ticket" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid for the ticket */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Embarked port (C, Q, S) */,
  "age_x_fare" REAL /* Product of age and fare for analytical purposes */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number for identification */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any medical conditions of the passenger */,
  "dietary_preferences" TEXT /* Dietary preferences of the passenger */,
  "travel_history" TEXT /* Travel history of the passenger */,
  "travel_frequency" TEXT /* How frequently the passenger travels with the company */,
  "loyalty_program_member" INTEGER /* Whether the passenger is a member of the loyalty program */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Points accumulated in the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked FOREIGN KEY ("embarked") REFERENCES embarkation_ports ("port_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the ticket class */,
  "class_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket class (e.g., 1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ticket class */,
  "deck_level" INTEGER /* Deck level where the cabin is located */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities included in the ticket class */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers per cabin */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Whether the class is available for booking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkation_ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_code" TEXT /* Code for the embarkation port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Full name of the port */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the port */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the port */,
  "timezone_offset" TEXT /* Timezone offset from UTC */,
  "local_currency" TEXT /* Local currency used at the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_status" (
  "survival_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for survival record */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger survived (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "rescue_time" TEXT /* Time when the passenger was rescued (if applicable) */,
  "rescue_location" TEXT /* Location where the passenger was rescued (if applicable) */,
  "medical_treatment" TEXT /* Any medical treatment received post-incident */,
  "follow_up" TEXT /* Follow-up actions taken for the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survival_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_status_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabin_details" (
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the cabin record */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger associated with the cabin */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number assigned to the passenger */,
  "deck_level" INTEGER /* Deck level of the cabin */,
  "cabin_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers the cabin can accommodate */,
  "cabin_type" TEXT /* Type of cabin (e.g., single, double, suite) */,
  "cabin_amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities in the cabin */,
  "cabin_status" TEXT /* Current status of the cabin (e.g., occupied, vacant, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabin_details_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger who holds the ticket */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Class of the ticket */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid for the ticket */,
  "travel_date" TEXT /* Date of travel */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of return (if applicable) */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket (e.g., booked, cancelled, checked-in) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES ticket_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_connections" (
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for family connection record */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., sibling, parent) */,
  "related_passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related passenger */,
  "relationship_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the relationship */,
  "relationship_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or details about the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_connections_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_connections_related_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging in */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from the user's device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emergency_protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the emergency protocol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the protocol */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp for the protocol */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the protocol */,
  "protocol_status" TEXT /* Status of the protocol (e.g., active, draft, retired) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who approved the protocol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_protocols_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_trainings" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the training */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic covered in the training */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the training in hours */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the trainer */,
  "trainee_ids" TEXT /* List of user IDs of the trainees */,
  "training_location" TEXT /* Location where the training was conducted */,
  "evaluation" TEXT /* Evaluation or feedback on the training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_trainings_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_trainings_trainee_ids FOREIGN KEY ("trainee_ids") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date and time feedback was submitted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Feedback comments provided by the passenger */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the passenger (1 to 5) */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "service_area" TEXT /* Area of service the feedback pertains to (e.g., cabin, food, safety) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the feedback has been addressed */,
  "follow_up" TEXT /* Follow-up actions taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_feedback_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident report */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger involved in the incident */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the incident */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the incident has been resolved */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., medical, lost item, security) */,
  "incident_location" TEXT /* Location where the incident occurred */,
  "reported_by_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who reported the incident */,
  "responsible_department" TEXT /* Department responsible for resolving the incident */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time it took to resolve the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_reports_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_reports_reported_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis conducted */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analytical findings */,
  "detail" TEXT /* Detailed description of the analysis results */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis conducted (e.g., survival rate, travel frequency) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used for analysis */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the analysis */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the findings */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
